title: carex × wolteri
intro: Carex × wolteri, also known as Wolter's sedge, is a hybrid plant species in the genus Carex. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Carex × wolteri include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antispasmodic, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as asthma and menstrual cramps. Carex × wolteri can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it has also been used in traditional herbal preparations to make tinctures and salves.
